title: Asignments of arithmetic operations embedded in a concatenation cause wrong conditional paths to be taken

features.name: concatenation lvalue assignment with arithmetic operation
features.description: Code should include a concatenation used as an lvalue (assignment target) receiving an arithmetic addition result
features.snippet:
wire [5:0] a; wire b; wire c; wire [7:0] sum = {1'b0, b, a};
assign {1'b0, b, a} = {1'b0, b, a} + {1'b1, c};

features.name: concatenation arithmetic with mixed-width operands
features.description: Code should include an addition operation between two concatenations with different bit widths to trigger overflow handling issues
